text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer? Oh, I'm sorry. The thing is...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Last night, I was exercising my legs so they'd look
beautiful when I wear glass slippers.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I got so into it that I was doing squats right up
until dawn! Now my legs feel like jelly!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Kawakami Princess didn't get much
sleep, or any rest for that matter...
